meta.note: This is the "Phase One" lineup only (33 billing lines / 34 artists counting the Cole Knight b2b Dreya V pairing), published by the official site on 2026-05-22. Multiple outlets (EDM Identity, EDMTunes, Beatportal, ravejungle, edmnomad, JamBase) independently confirm this same phase-one roster and count. The official site itself and press coverage explicitly state "phase one" — a Phase Two / by-day lineup reveal is expected later (for the 2025/8.0 edition, Phase 2 + by-day split landed ~Sept 19, ~8 weeks before the fest, so a 2026 Phase 2 is plausible around Aug-Sept 2026 but has NOT happened yet as of 2026-07-07). No day assignments, stage assignments, or set times exist yet for any artist — do not infer them. The three stage names (Volcano/Tsunami/Frequency) are venue-level recurring stages mentioned in press coverage, not yet mapped to specific artists for 2026.
